title: MapTracker Component Schema
description: All MapTracker custom action and recognition parameter definitions. Referenced by custom.action.schema.json and custom.recognition.schema.json.

LocationCondition.description: A single map location condition: map_name + bounding box.

target.title: Target
target.description: Bounding box [x, y, w, h] defining the expected region in map pixel coordinates.

MapTrackerMovementBaseParam.description: Shared movement parameters for MapTrackerMove and MapTrackerGoal.

path.title: Path
path.description: Sequence of [x, y] coordinate waypoints to follow in order.

path_trim.title: Path Trim
path_trim.description: Start from the nearest waypoint to current location (skip earlier points).

fine_approach.title: Fine Approach
fine_approach.description: When to enable fine approaching (precise arrival).

on_finish.title: On Finish
on_finish.description: Inline pipeline node object executed once after navigation succeeds.

no_ensure_initial_movement_state.title: No Ensure Initial Movement State
no_ensure_initial_movement_state.description: Skip sprint preparation before first move.

arrival_threshold.title: Arrival Threshold
arrival_threshold.description: Distance threshold in pixels to consider a target reached.

arrival_timeout.title: Arrival Timeout
arrival_timeout.description: Max time in milliseconds to reach each target point.

rotation_lower_threshold.title: Rotation Lower Threshold
rotation_lower_threshold.description: Angular difference threshold in degrees for minor rotation adjustment.

rotation_upper_threshold.title: Rotation Upper Threshold
rotation_upper_threshold.description: Angular difference threshold in degrees for major rotation adjustment.

sprint_threshold.title: Sprint Threshold
sprint_threshold.description: Distance threshold in pixels beyond which sprinting is used.

stuck_threshold.title: Stuck Threshold
stuck_threshold.description: Duration in milliseconds before triggering stuck mitigation.

stuck_timeout.title: Stuck Timeout
stuck_timeout.description: Max time in milliseconds to tolerate being stuck before failing.

stuck_mitigators.title: Stuck Mitigators
stuck_mitigators.description: Sequential actions to take when stuck.

map_name_match_rule.title: Map Name Match Rule
map_name_match_rule.description: Regex template for matching map names. %s is replaced by map_name (auto-escaped).

MapTrackerMoveParam.description: Parameters for MapTrackerMove: navigate player along waypoints using minimap tracking.

MapTrackerGoalParam.description: Parameters for MapTrackerGoal: navigate to a target coordinate or entity through NavMesh pathfinding.

target.title: Target
target.description: Target coordinate [x, y] in map pixel coordinates.

entity_id.title: Entity ID
entity_id.description: NavMesh entity ID to look up as the target.

zipline_policy.title: Zipline Policy
zipline_policy.description: How aggressively MapTrackerGoal should consider runtime zipline edges.

MapTrackerTowardParam.description: Parameters for MapTrackerToward: adjust the player's orientation to face a given angle or map point. At least one of angle and target must be provided; angle takes precedence when both are set.

angle.title: Angle
angle.description: Target orientation in degrees, where 0 is North and the value increases clockwise.

map_name.title: Map Name
map_name.description: Unique map identifier. Required only in target mode (when target is set); in pure angle mode the rotation is inferred without any map dependency.

target.title: Target
target.description: Map coordinate [x, y] the player should face toward.

rotation_threshold.title: Rotation Threshold
rotation_threshold.description: Maximum allowed angle difference in degrees to treat the player as already facing the target orientation.

map_name_match_rule.title: Map Name Match Rule
map_name_match_rule.description: Regex template for matching map names. %s is replaced by map_name (auto-escaped).

MapTrackerZiplineParam.description: Parameters for MapTrackerZipline: perform one zipline fast travel while already on a zipline.

target.title: Target
target.description: Target zipline point coordinate [x, y] in map pixel coordinates.

map_name_match_rule.title: Map Name Match Rule
map_name_match_rule.description: Regex template for matching map names. %s is replaced by map_name (auto-escaped).

rotation_threshold.title: Rotation Threshold
rotation_threshold.description: Angular difference threshold in degrees to consider the target zipline point aligned.

timeout.title: Timeout
timeout.description: Max time in milliseconds for rotation and movement completion.

MapTrackerBigMapPickParam.description: Parameters for MapTrackerBigMapPick: pan big map view to find and interact with a target coordinate.

target.title: Target
target.description: Target coordinate [x, y] on the big map in map pixel coordinates.

auto_open_map_scene.title: Auto Open Map Scene
auto_open_map_scene.description: Automatically open the big map scene before picking.

MapTrackerBigMapZoomParam.description: Parameters for MapTrackerBigMapZoom: adjust the big-map zoom slider to a target position.

zoom_value.title: Zoom Value
zoom_value.description: Target slider position in range (0, 1], where 1 is zoom-out end and values near 0 are zoom-in end. Set to 0 to disable the zoom action.

MapTrackerAssertLocationParam.description: Parameters for MapTrackerAssertLocation: assert player is within expected map region(s).

expected.title: Expected
expected.description: List of location conditions (OR logic). Player must satisfy at least one.

precision.title: Precision
precision.description: Inference precision/speed tradeoff. Higher = more accurate but slower.

threshold.title: Threshold
threshold.description: Minimum confidence to consider inference successful.

MapTrackerInferParam.description: Parameters for MapTrackerInfer: infer player's current map, position and heading.

map_name_regex.title: Map Name Regex
map_name_regex.description: Regex to filter which maps participate in recognition.

precision.title: Precision
precision.description: Inference precision/speed tradeoff. Higher for more accurate but slower.

threshold.title: Threshold
threshold.description: Minimum confidence to consider inference successful.

allowed_modes.title: Allowed Modes
allowed_modes.description: Bitmask controlling which location inference modes are allowed. 1 = FullSearch, 2 = FastSearch. Default 3 (both).

MapTrackerBigMapInferParam.description: Parameters for MapTrackerBigMapInfer: infer current viewport position and zoom on the big map.

map_name_regex.title: Map Name Regex
map_name_regex.description: Regex to filter which maps participate in recognition.

threshold.title: Threshold
threshold.description: Minimum confidence to consider inference successful.

MapTrackerBigMapFindImageParam.description: Parameters for MapTrackerBigMapFindImage: find icon images in the current big-map viewport, optionally panning until required points are visible.

expected.title: Expected
expected.description: Recognition hit condition: true for at least one match, false for no matches, integer for exact match count, or an object with map_name and target for a required map-coordinate rectangle hit.

map_name.title: Map Name
map_name.description: Map identifier that the match must land on.

target.title: Target
target.description: Bounding box [x, y, w, h] defining the required hit region in map pixel coordinates.

max_matches.title: Max Matches
max_matches.description: Maximum number of matches to return.

green_mask.title: Green Mask
green_mask.description: Use green pixels in the template as mask pixels.

with_rotation.title: With Rotation
with_rotation.description: Match the template across rotations and return the matched angle.

zoom_value.title: Zoom Value
zoom_value.description: Optional big-map zoom slider position (0-1) to apply before matching.

must_see_points.title: Must See Points
must_see_points.description: Map points that must all be covered by the big-map viewport before matching.

map_name_regex.title: Map Name Regex
map_name_regex.description: Regex to filter which maps participate in inference. When set, limits MapTrackerBigMapInfer to matching candidate maps only.
